versionImpact.rationale: This prerelease makes the session-model failure explicit, preserves the Project Cut and builder strategy, and establishes a title-independent publication coordinate.

surfaceImpacts.rationale: The paper now makes Project Cut the first user object and specifies cross-session continuation, runtime, authority, evidence, maturity, and non-claim boundaries.
The builder path now explicitly recommends embedding libkungfu immediately while developing a participant-owned KFD-compatible Hub in parallel.
Generated brand and evidence bundles expose the new title, section map, claims, adoption path, and alpha residual-risk boundary to site consumers.
The PDF and brand-site route move to the durable kungfu-white-paper coordinate; the npm coordinate and Buildchain archive identity remain stable.

summary: The paper now opens with the session-continuity failure and publishes through a durable, title-independent white-paper coordinate.
